chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Times When Intercourse is Disliked

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ جَامَعَ اِمْرَأَتَهُ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ فَخَرَجَ اَلْوَلَدُ مَجْذُوماً أَوْ أَبْرَصَ فَلاَ يَلُومَنَّ إِلاَّ نَفْسَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4413 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said: "Whoever has intercourse with his wife while she is menstruating, and a child is born afflicted with leprosy or vitiligo, let him blame none but himself."
